name: stockwise-monorepo
description: Monorepo inicial para el sprint 1 del sistema de inventario

scripts.dev:auth: cd auth-service && pnpm exec node server.js
scripts.dev:service-a: cd services/service-a && pnpm exec node server.js
scripts.dev:service-b: cd services/service-b && pnpm exec node server.js
scripts.dev:all: pnpm exec concurrently "cd auth-service && pnpm exec node server.js" "cd services/service-a && pnpm exec node server.js" "cd services/service-b && pnpm exec node server.js" "cd frontend && pnpm run dev"
